name: memorydetective
description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation. Reads .memgraph and .trace files, classifies retain cycles against a 34-pattern catalog (SwiftUI / Combine / Concurrency / UIKit / Core Animation / Core Data / SwiftData / Coordinator / RxSwift / Realm). Every classification ships with a Swift fixTemplate snippet you can adapt directly. Captures fresh memgraphs/traces via xctrace and leaks(1), bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP. 28 MCP tools, 34 catalog resources, 5 investigation prompts.
